parsed.production_notes: The female character is human-recorded, while the male character in the PIP is an AI avatar, evidenced by the static face with only the mouth moving. The second half is a digital screencast.

characters.appearance: Young woman, medium build, fair complexion. She has dark hair tied back. Her facial features are soft and expressive.
characters.wardrobe: Long-sleeved pink top and dark blue jeans.
characters.demeanor: Relaxed, slightly hesitant but eager to learn.

characters.appearance: Young man, fair complexion, dark curly hair. He has a clean-shaven face and a neutral expression.

scenes.setting: Bedroom, daytime, bed with patterned sheets, wood-paneled wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman lies on her stomach on a bed, holding a smartphone in both hands. She wears a long-sleeved pink top and blue jeans. The bed has a white sheet with a blue and brown floral pattern. Behind her is a wall with a textured, wood-like finish. The lighting is bright and even.
A young man with dark, curly hair and a fair complexion is visible from the chest up. He wears a plain dark blue t-shirt. The background behind him consists of large, green palm leaves.

scenes.visual_description: A young woman is lying on a bed, holding her phone and talking. In the top right corner, there is a circular inset showing a young man's face. The woman appears to be having a video call or interacting with an app.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Hello. [Hello.]
Character A says: Hello. [Hello.]
Character B says: Um... आता काय बोलायचं? [Um... what to say now?]
Character A says: मला पण तेच वाटतंय. [I feel the same.]
Character B says: How are you Neha? [How are you Neha?]
Character A says: I am... छान आहे मी. [I am... I am fine.]
Character B says: तसं नाही, असं बोल, I am good. [Not like that, say it like this, I am good.]
Character A says: I am good. [I am good.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A digital screen displaying a white background with various rectangular placeholders and a blue button. It then transitions to a dark blue background featuring a glowing, circular podium in the center, surrounded by sparkling light effects.

scenes.visual_description: The scene transitions to a screen recording of a mobile phone. It shows the Google Play Store page for an app, highlighting the download count. Then it switches to a premium subscription screen with a special offer.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: MySivi ॲपवर एक कोटी लोकं स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करतात. [One crore people practice spoken English on the MySivi app.]
Unknown speaker says: तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. [You also start today.]
Unknown speaker says: ट्रायल फक्त एक रुपयात. [Trial for just one rupee.]
